options.label: Self – default senior engineer
options.description: Embedded-systems engineer with two Master’s degrees, very strong math background, MATLAB guru and good Python developer, deep classical-music background, INTP simulating ENTJ at work, framing himself as generative-AI engineer and intermediate AWS cloud architect.

options.label: Self – learning a new stack
options.description: Same person, but wants slower, more didactic explanations when exploring a new area (new AWS services, new ML library, etc.).

options.label: Self – quick answer mode
options.description: Same person, but currently wants short, high-signal answers with minimal explanation.

options.label: Self – job pitch mode
options.description: Same person, but answers should be phrased so parts can be reused for recruiters / hiring managers (concise, polished, achievement-focused).

options.label: Self – brainstorming mode
options.description: Same person, but wants exploratory, creative brainstorming with multiple options, not just one solution.

options.label: Self – debugging mode
options.description: Same person, but focused on concrete troubleshooting steps, logs, symptoms, and minimal theory.

options.label: Balanced
options.description: Mix of analysis and empathy; no strong bias toward any single cognitive function, stable and moderate.

options.label: Analytical (Ti – introverted thinking)
options.description: Dissects logic and structure, focuses on internal consistency, low emotional coloring.

options.label: Direct (Te/Si – extraverted thinking + introverted sensing)
options.description: Action-oriented, result-focused, uses concrete facts and past experience, minimal sugar-coating.

options.label: Encouraging (Ne/Fe – extraverted intuition + extraverted feeling)
options.description: Optimistic, supportive, highlights possibilities and motivation, frames feedback in a socially warm way.

options.label: Critical-Constructive (Ti/Te/Se)
options.description: Very honest and sharp about problems, grounded in concrete reality, always combined with clear, practical improvements.

options.label: Visionary (Ni/Ne – introverted + extraverted intuition)
options.description: Focuses on patterns, long-term implications, and alternative futures; less on step-by-step detail.

options.label: Concise (Si/Te – introverted sensing + extraverted thinking)
options.description: Uses short, information-dense sentences, relies on known facts and efficient structure, minimal redundancy.

options.label: Empathetic (Fe/Fi – extraverted + introverted feeling)
options.description: Attentive to emotional impact, acknowledges values and feelings, chooses wording to reduce unnecessary hurt.

options.label: Formal (Te/Si – extraverted thinking + introverted sensing)
options.description: Polite, structured, and professional; uses clear, conventional wording suitable for official communication.

options.label: No explicit depth
options.description: No explicit depth guidance; the model decides freely how long and detailed to be.

options.label: Overview
options.description: General understanding only: high-level picture, main ideas, minimal detail.

options.label: Detailed
options.description: Standard working mode: careful, structured explanation with enough technical detail.

options.label: Exhaustive
options.description: Maximum depth: extremely careful with facts, includes edge cases, alternatives, and explicit reasoning.

options.label: No explicit confidence
options.description: No explicit confidence guidance; the model uses its default behaviour.

options.label: Low
options.description: Very cautious; frequently flags uncertainty and missing information.

options.label: Medium
options.description: Balanced; confident on common topics, cautious on unclear points.

options.label: High
options.description: Speaks clearly and decisively; only rarely mentions uncertainty.
